changes.description: New monthly NAV $32.08 (Class F-I) as of Mar 31 2026 (-0.62% vs Feb $32.28). Series II Transactional NAV $233.3M (+12.7% vs $207.0M Feb). April 1 2026 subscriptions $52.4M total (Class F-I 309,611 shares for $9.93M).

New monthly NAV $29.96 (Class I) as of Mar 31 2026 (-1.06% vs Feb $30.28). Total Transactional NAV $7,230.7M (+2.87%). April 1 2026 share sale $269.5M (Class I 5,012,494 shares for $150.2M). $0.3300/share distribution declared 2026-03-31.

New monthly NAV $24.9176 (Class I/D/S) as of Mar 31 2026 (-0.03% vs Feb $24.9252). Aggregate NAV $3,130.0M (+12.5%). April subs $313.1M finalized 2026-04-23 (Class I 10.53M shares $262.5M). April distribution $0.20830/share gross. Rover Credit Agreement (~$1.09B Term Loan B, SOFR+2.25%, matures 2031) acquired 2026-04-28.

New monthly NAV $32.15 (Class I-1) as of Mar 31 2026 (+1.23% vs Feb $31.76). SP+ INFRA cumulative capital raised $1,292M (April +$100.5M, Fund-only $65.0M). Class A-1a $31.82, A-1b $31.86, A-1c $31.89, F-1 $31.89, X $32.91. Item 5.03 May 4 2026: Third A&R LPA authorizing new Class Z series.
